message:
feat: Add full 32-layer MoE performance test

New test measures REAL tok/s by running all 32 MoE layers with all
optimizations enabled.

Results on M2 Pro 16GB with Q4_K_M:
- MoE throughput: 21.3 tok/s
- Estimated real-world: 12.8 tok/s (with attention overhead)
- Hot cache hit rate: 90.2%
- Dynamic Top-1 rate: 95.2% (almost all cold experts skipped!)
- Shadow Router: 32/32 layers loaded

Usage: zig build test-full-moe-perf -- <model.gguf>
